title: BCMA Measurement Context Audit v0

sources.label: Di Meo et al. 2025, Cancer Cell, PMID 41072416

limitations: This audit flags measurement-context completeness; it does not judge clinical actionability.
Captured or partially captured context does not make a measurement sufficient for diagnosis, treatment selection, or trial selection.
The audit is based on current public extraction and claim artifacts plus public source records available on the stated date.
The Di Meo 2025 full methods were not extracted into this v0 public audit, so method details should be treated as incomplete unless verified from an accessible source.
The audit does not compare target-status or antigen-density results across studies.
The audit does not estimate BCMA antigen-loss or low-density frequency.
